name: Broccoli Stuffed Shells
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Vegetable broth (I used Hains Fat Free Vegetable Broth)
18 Jumbo shell macaroni, cooked al dente and drained
Fresh ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the vegetable broth in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the mushrooms, onions, and garlic. Cook, stirring, for 5 minutes or until lightly browned.
3. Remove from heat and stir in the oregano, basil, ricotta cheese, broccoli, and egg whites.
4. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
5. Stuff the drained shells with the ricotta-broccoli mixture.
6. Spread half a cup of tomato sauce on the bottom of a 9 by 13 inch nonstick baking pan.
7. Arrange the shells over the sauce. Top with the remaining sauce.
8. Bake for 30 minutes or until the shells are hot. Season with black pepper to taste.
(Note: This recipe is adapted from Schlesinger's 500 Fat-Free Recipes.)
